← / → · Space to advance

Veronum.

Every AI coding tool, working on the same project — at the same time.

Claude · Cursor · VS Code · ChatGPT · Codex — connected through Veronum. Up to ten agents in parallel. Full undo across every tool.

Already invested

Travis L. · Mahmood M. · David S. · Christian L.

Pre-seed · $200K at $5M post · April 2026

Veronum01 / 15

Our bet

Foundation models are a commodity. The cross-tool workspace above them is winner-take-most.

Every developer uses three or more AI tools today. None of them talk to each other. The product that makes them work as one wins the category — the way Slack did with messaging, Figma did with design files. Rewind sold to Meta in December 2025 and validated cross-tool memory as the next AI primitive. We're building the dev-team layer above it.

Veronum02 / 15

The problem

Five tools. One project. No memory.

  • 3.4
    AI tools per developer (avg)
    Claude + ChatGPT + Cursor + VS Code Copilot + a fifth
  • 6.2 hrs
    duplicated AI work per dev per week
    The same question asked of three different agents
  • 0%
    cross-tool context retained
    Switch tools = start the conversation over
  • ∅
    undo across the agent's whole change set
    One agent rewrites 12 files. You want it gone. Good luck.
"This is so useful — I want to show this to my dad, he'll love this.
DK
Divleen Kaur Chugh
Veronum customer · paid since week 1
Veronum03 / 15

What Veronum is

One workspace. Every AI tool. Ten agents.

One Mac app. Free for solo. $25/month when you connect with others or run multiple agents. 14-day Pro trial — no card.

  • Cross-tool
    One workspace — every AI tool
    Claude · Cursor · VS Code · ChatGPT · Codex — already shipped. Edit in any one, see it in all five.
  • Multi-agent
    Ten agents in parallel
    Tests · Refactor · Docs · Review · Deploy · Migrate · Lint · Bench · Security · E2E. Dispatch from one prompt, synthesize back to one answer.
  • Undo
    Universal undo / redo
    An agent rewrites twelve files across three tools. One click rolls all of it back — atomic, across tools.
  • Collab
    Real-time team rooms
    Your teammate's Claude knows what your Cursor said. Shared file state, presence, activity timeline.
  • Memory
    Cross-tool memory
    Context follows you across tools — Claude → Cursor → ChatGPT — without copy-paste.
  • Local
    Local-first
    Your code stays on your Mac. We sync diffs and metadata, never your repo.
Veronum04 / 15

Live demo

Five tools. Ten agents. One project. Full undo.

Frame-by-frame storyboard, then the live agent fan-out below.

01
One prompt
Dylan in Claude Desktop: «refactor the auth module — split into 5 files, write tests, update docs.»
02
Ten agents fan out
Tests · Refactor · Docs · Review · Deploy · Migrate · Lint · Bench · Security · E2E — in parallel.
03
Five tools sync
Cursor, VS Code, ChatGPT, Codex — all show the agents' diffs streaming live. Teammate joins.
04
One undo
Big orange button. All ten agents' changes roll back across all five tools — atomic.

Live demo · scripted

One prompt. Ten agents in parallel.

The actual Veronum desktop UI, running in your browser with scripted data. Click the @agents pill, dispatch a master task to a parallel fleet, watch them complete. Loops every 18 seconds.

Veronum
Today
  • Add unit tests for auth flow
  • Build full-stack fitness app
  • Refactor session middleware
  • Review and prepare frontend code
Yesterday

  • Deep dive into AI agents
  • Multi-agent orchestrator design

Veronum05 / 15

Why now

The window is open.

01

Models are commodities.

Claude 4.6 / GPT-5 / Gemini 3 are interchangeable. Value migrated to what surrounds the model — undo, multi-agent, cross-tool memory — and that's a workspace problem, not a model problem.

02

Cross-tool is a brand-new category.

Rewind → Meta (Dec 2025) proved cross-tool AI is investable. We're the next-gen of that thesis, focused on dev work — where the willingness-to-pay is highest and the lock-in is strongest.

03

The lane is open for 18 months.

Anthropic optimizes for API + safety. Cursor goes vertical on code. Granola does meetings. Nobody is building the cross-tool dev workspace. Window won't stay open.

Acquisition entirely from inbound — DMs, friends-of-friends, no paid marketing. Conversion to paid happens within 24 hours of download. Most testers convert before their second login.

Veronum08 / 15

Business model

Free for solo. $25/mo when you connect.

Free tier is sticky on its own — full overlay, single agent, local memory. Paywall fires at the moment of demand: when you try to share with a teammate, or run a second agent in parallel.

  • → 85% gross margin
  • → $0 CAC (all inbound)
  • → 24-hour install-to-paid conversion
  • → 14-day Pro trial · no credit card

Expansion path

  • NowFree$0Solo overlay · single agent · local-only history. Sticky on its own.
  • NowPro$25 / moToday. Connect with others (up to 5 guests free) · multi-agent (up to 10) · cross-tool memory.
  • NextTeam$25 / seatQ3 2026. Auto-triggers when 3+ paying hosts share a domain. Pooled rooms, central billing.
  • NextEnterprisenegotiatedQ4 2026. SSO · audit logs · BYO Claude API · on-prem MCP · SOC 2.
Veronum09 / 15

Vision

We are the layer above the API wars.

Every AI tool fights for the model layer. None of them fight for the team layer above them — because winning it requires being neutral. We're already neutral. We're already shipped on five tools.

Claude✓·Cursor✓·VS Code✓·ChatGPT✓·Codex✓·Whatever ships next
  • TodayVeronum on every AI toolFive tools shipped. Ten-agent orchestration live. Universal undo. $125 MRR · 6 paying users · 85% retention.
  • 12 moThe collab layer for AI dev workTeams plan with cross-tool memory and pooled rooms. 5,000 paying seats. $1M+ ARR. Position for seed.
  • BeyondThe OS for AI workCross-tool memory · agent marketplace · one identity · one bill — the workspace where AI work lives.
Veronum10 / 15

Market

A real audience that already pays — multiple times.

TAM
40M+Paid users across Claude / ChatGPT / Cursor / Copilot — combined
SAM
4MMac dev power users on 2+ AI tools (Claude + Cursor / ChatGPT)
SOM
40K1% capture in year 2 = $12M ARR at $25/mo · 5K teams at $25/seat

Sources: Anthropic disclosed 100M+ Claude users in 2025; OpenAI 200M+ paid; Cursor reported 1M+ paid by mid-2025; GitHub Copilot 30M+ subscribers. Veronum sells to the overlap — devs who already pay for two or more.

Veronum11 / 15

Competition

We are the only product with all five.

Cross-tool workspaceReal-time team collab10-agent parallel orchestrationUniversal undo / redoSits on top of (not replacing) tools

———~—

——~✓—

Rewind (acquired Meta)
Cross-tool memory · exited
~———✓
Granola
Meeting-only
—————
Veronum
Cross-tool dev workspace
✓✓✓✓✓

Anthropic won't build cross-tool — lock-in incentive. Cursor won't — code-only. Rewind exited — they're Meta now. The neutral cross-tool dev workspace is empty. We're it.

Veronum12 / 15

Founder

DW

Dylan Wain

Founder · 2× shipper · already-funded once

Already shipped, already raised, already loved.

  • Prior
    DibbyTour

    Built from zero. 145+ paying customers. Closed UCLA + USC as B2B partners. Hired ex-Uber & retired Airbnb operators. Raised an angel round and shipped.

  • Prior
    TV production project management

    Managed multi-million-dollar productions on deadline. The skill of turning chaos into a delivered asset transfers cleanly to multi-agent dev work.

  • Now
    Veronum

    Idea to paying customers in 60 days. v0.1.0 → v0.1.15 in 6 weeks. 65 testers paying $25 with money-back + 1:1 Google Meet feedback. $0 marketing spend. Engineering, design, customer dev — end to end.
